gist.headline: Sweeping up the hive
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the image backend, removing old Cloudflare code that was no longer being used. A lighter codebase means a happier hive!
gist.summary: Removed unused Cloudflare image-generation helpers and stale secrets from the image backend.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces technical debt and keeps the image service codebase lean and maintainable.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) sweeping up dead leaves or old code blocks in a cozy garden setting, with the Nomnom creature eating old deprecated code snippets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating deprecated code snippets from a dusty box, while the cute bee mascot sweeps the floor with a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
